steps.title: Calculate the volume of the cube
steps.content:
The cube has an edge length of 3.00 cm.
$$V = (3.00)^3 = 27.00 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Apply the density formula and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute the mass (19.44 g) and volume (27.00 cm^3) into the density formula:
$$\text{Density} = \frac{19.44 \text{ g}}{27.00 \text{ cm}^3} = 0.72 \text{ g/cm}^3$$
